arts.sum: Real Madrid received a major blow earlier this week when it was confirmed that Vinicius Junior had suffered an injury during Sunday’s victory over Leganes. He will miss Wednesday’s Champions League showdown against Liverpool, and his overall time on the sidelines is expected to be 2-3 weeks. arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson used Liverpool game as excuse to break promise he made at Man Utd
arts.sum: Dimitar Berbatov was made a promise by Sir Alex Ferguson when he joined Manchester United, but a crucial Liverpool fixture at Anfield meant the Scot quickly went back on his word

'I felt a bit like the scapegoat' - Bellingham
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham says he has got his smile back after "feeling a bit like the scapegoat" for England's failure to win Euro 2024.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive triple injury boost as Alexander-Arnold update issued
arts.sum: Liverpool have been handed a major injury boost as Trent Alexander-Arnold returned to training ahead of facing Real Madrid in the Uefa Champions League on Wednesday. The right-back sustained a hamstring injury during the 2-0 win over Aston Villa, forcing him off the pitch at halftime, earlier this month. arts.ttl: Mascherano appointed as new Inter Miami coach
arts.sum: Inter Miami confirmed that former Liverpool, Barcelona and Argentina defender Javier Mascherano will take over as the team's new coach.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Real Madrid carry Champions League aura
arts.sum: Real have won the competition a record 15 times, twice beating Liverpool in the final.
